nodes.label: TractionBatteryCode
nodes.description: The traction battery code is an identification code for any automotive traction battery, ultracapacitor and other reachargeble energy storage device. It allows to carry information as required by the National Standard of the People's Republic of China according to GB/T 34014-2017 published by the Standardization Administration of China (SAC).

nodes.label: tractionBatteryCode
nodes.description: Traction Battery Code identifying a single traction battery component like a pack, module or cell.

nodes.label: subcomponents
nodes.description:
Subcomponents of the component, if applicable. The relationship between traction battery codes are as follows:

If this traction battery code is given for a cell subcomponents are not required. 
If this traction battery code is given for a battery module a list of cells are required to be registered as subcomponents.
If this traction battery code is given for a battery pack a list of modules are required to be registered as subcomponents (containing each a list of cell subcomponents respectively).

nodes.label: productType
nodes.description: The type of the battery component, e.g. a pack, a module or a cell.

nodes.label: ComponentList
nodes.description: A list of battery components like modules or cells.

nodes.label: TractionBatteryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: A code identifying a traction battery component like a pack, module or cell.

nodes.label: TractionBatteryCodeRegularExpression
nodes.description: The traction battery code as required by the National Standard of the People's Republic of China according to GB/T 34014-2017 published by the Standardization Administration of China (SAC). It can have a length of either 24 or 18 characters.

nodes.label: TractionBatteryComponent
nodes.description: A battery component like a cell or a module.
